allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/core/world.js'\).then\(m => { const w = m.createWorld\(\(await import\('./src/core/config.js'\)\).CONFIG\); console.log\('world keys:', Object.keys\(w\).join\(', '\)\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('IMPORT FAILED:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
